name: intramuscular
source: psychonautwiki-journal-android:Substances.json (no PK params); heuristic Bateman fallback only. NOTE: Oyama-s-HRT-Tracker injection uses a two-depot + 3-compartment analytical model (L3.pk.model_type=oyama_injection_two_depot_3c), so do not interpret default_ka_per_hour as clinical IM kinetics.
